BebeCoin

The cutest memecoin on the block(chain)!

What is BebeCoin?

BebeCoin (BEBE) is a new meme cryptocurrency that's simple, adorable, and all about fun. It's black, it's white, it's bold — just like our community.

Why BebeCoin?

  • Community-driven and fun-focused
  • Zero utility, maximum vibes
  • No rug pulls, just cuddles

Join the Movement!

Hop into our Telegram or follow us on Twitter. Let's go BEBE!

© 2026 BebeCoin

blocks.text:
All color values in style.css have been changed to a shade of blue (#2196f3).

You can refresh your browser to see the blue color applied throughout the site. If you need specific elements to use a different blue, or want a different visual effect, let me know!
